temporal_description: A static, medium shot captures the silhouette of a person standing against a dramatic, cloudy sky at either dawn or dusk. The figure is dark and indistinct, with only the basic shape of their head and shoulders visible. The background is filled with a moody, atmospheric sky, composed of dark, heavy clouds and patches of lighter, brighter areas, suggesting a low sun just out of frame. In the upper left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains still throughout the clip, maintaining a steady focus on the silhouetted figure and the expansive, somber sky. The audio features a slow, melancholic, and ethereal musical piece. A high-pitched, almost angelic female voice sings a wordless, haunting melody, creating a deeply somber and contemplative atmosphere. The music is ambient and atmospheric, with a slow tempo that evokes a sense of loneliness and introspection. There are no other sound effects, allowing the poignant vocal performance and the simple, sorrowful melody to be the central focus.
